episode_title: KT #755 - DR PHIL (ADAM RAY) + SAL VULCANO, + GREG FITZSIMMONS

1.premise: iPhone vs Android text color discrimination mirrors the structure of racial discrimination.
Phone text discrimination is like racial discrimination because both judge people by color.

2.premise: The green/blue text divide is like the racial divide because both inspire the same dream of unity.

3.premise: Android supporters are like civil rights marchers because both use protest chants over an arbitrary color divide.

lines.text: - Yo, what's going on?
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Yo, Tony.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Yo, recently I've been trying to date,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: but it's been very hard with an Android phone
lines.label: setup

lines.text: because for some reason,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: iPhone users always discriminate on me
lines.label: setup

lines.text: based off the color of my text messages.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: You know what I mean?
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: It's always weird.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Like every time I'm in the club
lines.label: setup

lines.text: and I'm trying to talk to a girl,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I feel like Martin Luther King.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I'm like, "I have a dream that one day green messages and blue messages will way they come
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: together."
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: You know what I mean?
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: It was great.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: I can imagine I'll have a group of Android supporters behind me leaving the club.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: They'll be chatting shit like, "Green or blue, we don't care.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Let us see your underwear."
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Shit's crazy.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Across the street, you'll see the iPhone supporters and they'll be saying shit like, "Well, it's
lines.label: setup

lines.text: if he ain't blue, then he can't come through
lines.label: tag

lines.text: or shit like that, you know what I mean?
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Yeah.
